accepted.bullet_text: [[pancham-line]] — base-stage slot in the Pancham evolutionary line cohort, occupying the **henchman-with-punishment-via-leaf-removal** archetype slot named in the cohort body. When Pancham makes a big mistake, its leaf gets taken away"* renders verbatim the cohort's anchor framing of the leaf-in-mouth signature as both personality marker and discipline mechanic, and the upright-panda-in-bamboo-grove visual register (warm orange-brown bamboo forest backdrop) matches the cohort's foundational visual canon for the base form. [cohort node body; frontmatter `flavor_text`]
accepted.archetype_slot: henchman-with-punishment-via-leaf-removal base form; upright-panda-in-bamboo-grove visual register

accepted.bullet_text: [[pancham-line]] — Stage-1 terminal slot in the Pancham evolutionary line cohort, occupying the **rowdy-but-attractive-boss with bamboo-leaf-as-sensory-organ** archetype slot named in the cohort body. The card's printed flavor *"This rowdy Pokémon boasts great physical strength. Many Trainers are also smitten by its lively character"* renders verbatim the cohort's tonal-contradiction anchor (imposing bulk paired with attractive liveliness), and the rocky-wilderness setting with imposing posture and the leaf-in-mouth still present matches the cohort's bancho-boss-in-wilderness visual register for the apex form. [cohort node body; frontmatter `flavor_text`]
accepted.archetype_slot: rowdy-but-attractive-boss Stage-1 terminal; bancho-boss-in-wilderness visual register

accepted.bullet_text: [[pancham-line]] — Stage-1 terminal slot in the Pancham evolutionary line cohort, occupying the **bamboo-leaf-as-sensory-organ** archetype slot named in the cohort body — the card's printed flavor *"Using its leaf, Pangoro can predict the moves of its opponents. It strikes with punches that can turn a dump truck into scrap with just one hit"* renders the cohort's leaf-as-functional-vibration-sensor canon explicitly and verbatim (more directly than the CEC-120 sibling print, where the sensory-organ canon is implicit). This is the cross-set / cross-distribution-context second Pangoro print (McDonald's Happy Meal promo vs the mainline Cosmic Eclipse expansion), broadening the line's corpus footprint across two distribution contexts per the cohort caveat. The dark smoky-void backdrop and forward-punching action pose match the cohort's bancho-boss combat-identity register at the Stage-1 final slot. [cohort node body; frontmatter `flavor_text`]
accepted.archetype_slot: bamboo-leaf-as-sensory-organ Stage-1; cross-set / cross-distribution-context second Pangoro print
